mapper.insert: INSERT INTO events (space_id, title, description, start_date, end_date, location, price, color, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{spaceId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{location}, #{price}, #{color}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, space_id, title, description, start_date, end_date, location, price, color, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM events WHERE space_id = #{spaceId} ORDER BY start_date ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE events SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, location = #{location}, price = #{price}, color = #{color}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
